type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
We have located updated guidance (Environment Canada, NPRI Toolbox; “Wet Cooling Tower Guidance For Particulate Matter”) for the calculation of PM from wet cooling towers, and have updated our 2012 calculations to reflect this change.  We will update the online submission for PM 10.  The reporting threshold has not been met for TPM and the PM2.5 emissions are calculated as less than zero, and therefore, neither of these indicators will be updated.

less natural gas was used in 2012 as compared to 2011

comments.comment: Sulfuric acid is used for water treatment in the ion exchange/removal process for the production of "demineralized water" for boiler feedwater to produce steam. It is used to regenerate cation resin beds/vessels. Production of steam decreased from the previous year, but some of the reason for the increase in use this year is due to the timing of activities.
